label: count(events) >= 50
statement_summary: Event Definitions: technical implementation of causal EVENT triggers (t0 anchors), with STATE windows derived downstream from source events. Metrics: frequency, co_occurrence. Tests: T_EDEF_01.

label: trigger_ts <= data_ts
statement_summary: Event Registry: deterministic, versioned taxonomy of tradable market situations, with strict separation between EVENT triggers and derived STATE windows. Metrics: prevalence, determinism. Tests: T_REG

label: prob(revert_within_30m | basis_spike > 3) > 0.7
statement_summary: Liquidity Mean Reversion: tendency of market prices to revert to a mean or fair value anchor after a temporary dislocation caused by liquidity shocks. Metrics: basis_zscore, vwap_deviation_bps, depth_

label: roll_spread_bps > 0
statement_summary: Microstructure Metrics: Quantitative measures of market liquidity, transaction costs, and trade toxicity. Metrics: roll_spread_bps, vpin_score, amihud_illiquidity. Tests: T_MICRO_01, T_MICRO_02, T_MIC

label: prob(reversal | streak >= 5) > 0.6
statement_summary: Trend Exhaustion: identification of mature trends likely to reverse or consolidate using age, slope decay, and OI behavior. Metrics: trend_age, oi_z, directional_streak. Tests: T_TREND_01.

label: autocorrelation(realized_vol_bps, 1) > 0.4
statement_summary: Volatility State Transitions: cyclical alternation between market states: compression, expansion, exhaustion, reset. Metrics: realized_vol_bps, atr_percentile, vol_compression_flag. Tests: T_VOL_01, T

label: all(input_ts <= t0)
statement_summary: Context Deltas: measurement of state changes (trajectories) in market environment variables leading up to an event. Metrics: vol_accel, basis_v. Tests: T_DELTA_01.

label: sharpe(A+B) > 2 * sharpe(A)
statement_summary: Context Interaction: study of edges manifesting only when multiple independent conditions align (e.g., low vol + session open). Metrics: interaction_lift, concordance. Tests: T_INT_01, T_INT_03.

label: impact(2Q) < 2 * impact(Q)
statement_summary: Execution / Cost Model: deterministic model of explicit fees and implicit frictions (spread, slippage, impact) using implementation shortfall. Metrics: shortfall, impact_bps. Tests: T_COST_01.

label: E[NY_range | Asia_range_pct < 0.3] > E[NY_range]
statement_summary: Session Microstructure: Market behavior and liquidity dynamics stratified by global trading sessions (Asia, Europe, US) and their overlaps. Metrics: session_range_pct, session_vol_z. Tests: T_SESS_01.

label: performance ~ 0 on randomized timestamps
statement_summary: ML Trading Models: application of learning models for regime detection or meta-labeling while adhering to strict PIT constraints. Metrics: auc_roc, overfit_ratio. Tests: T_ML_01, T_ML_02.

label: q_value <= 0.05
statement_summary: Multiplicity Control: statistical correction layer preventing false discoveries when testing many hypotheses on the same data. Metrics: q_value, deflated_sharpe. Tests: T_MULT_01.

label: 80% of neighborhood must be profitable
statement_summary: Strategy Backtesting: long-horizon simulation of candidate edges incorporating parameter sweeps and microstructure stress tests. Metrics: backtest_sharpe, max_dd. Tests: T_BTEST_01, T_BTEST_02.

label: expectancy > 0 in 3+ regimes
statement_summary: Validation & Statistical Controls: formal process of converting conditional returns into valid edges using cross-validation and regime partitioning. Metrics: after_cost_expectancy, stability_score. Te

label: all non-null core fields
statement_summary: Venue Data Contracts: formal specification of venue-specific mechanics and data schemas ensuring correct translation into the research data plane. Metrics: conformance_rate, monotonicity. Tests: T_CON

label: has(timestamp, symbol, run_id)
statement_summary: Universal Labeling Schema: minimal schema for PIT features, forward labels, and events ensuring cross-symbol consistency. Metrics: null_rate, schema_hash. Tests: T_SCH_01.

label: valid SHA and hashes present
statement_summary: Deterministic Replay / Provenance: requirement that every research result is perfectly reproducible from versioned inputs, code, and config. Metrics: match_rate. Tests: T_PROV_01, T_PROV_02.

label: If any required_invariant fails, evaluation_guard raises EvaluationModeViolation. ablation.py must not write lift_claim_report.parquet. run_walkforward.py must not write oos_claim_report.json.
statement_summary: Evaluation Mode: A boolean gate that controls whether claim-level lift and OOS artifacts may be produced. When evaluation_mode is True, all required invariants defined in the active hypothesis spec ha

label: basis within carry bounds > 90%
statement_summary: Invariants: structural constraints and relationships (e.g., parity) used as sanity checks and mispricing anchors. Metrics: parity_dev, tri_arb. Tests: T_INV_01.

label: has_locator(claim) == True
statement_summary: Literature Review / Meta-Analysis: synthesis of external research to identify new mechanisms and validate existing Atlas assumptions. Metrics: evidence_strength, conversion_rate. Tests: T_LIT_01.

label: variance_ratio in [0.9, 1.1]
statement_summary: Market Efficiency: dynamic degree to which market prices reflect all available information, often violating random walk assumptions. Metrics: variance_ratio, hurst_exponent, return_autocorr. Tests: T_

label: risk_contribution_i < 0.25
statement_summary: Portfolio / Allocation / Risk: management of multiple strategy equity curves to achieve a target risk profile via deterministic risk gates. Metrics: portfolio_sharpe, turnover. Tests: T_PORT_01, T_POR
